FS_GPlib-tutorial
  • Library

  • Edit on GitHub

Epidemic Models

abababa

In FS_GPlib are implemented the following Epidemic models:

  • SI
  • SIS
  • SIR
  • SEIR
  • SEIR_ct
  • SEIS
  • SEIS_ct
  • SWIR(TBD)
  • Threshold
  • Kertesz Threshold
  • Independent Cascades
  • Profile
  • Profile Threshold
